---
title: "AI Tools"
---

::: {.home-bubble-grid}

::: {.home-bubble-card}
## Tech Readiness Tool

[A Tech Readiness Tutorial](https://robertwwalker.github.io/TJTechReady/index.html){target="_blank"}
:::


::: {.home-bubble-card}
## An Operations Simulator

[Queueing Theory Simulations](https://robertwwalker.github.io/AI-Tools/ClaudeQueues/){target="_blank"}
:::

::: {.home-bubble-card}
## Probability and Stats Tools

[Some Statistics Tools](https://robertwwalker.github.io/GeminiStatsDist/){target="_blank"}
:::

:::
